sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50087" key="i(eropompo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερο-πομπός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50087.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who conveys the sacred tribute</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:224" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">224</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:578" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">578</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
